title: dendranthema hultenii
intro: Dendranthema hultenii, also known as Hulten's Chrysanthemum or Hulten's Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the high-altitude meadows of the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain sesquiterpene lactones with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema hultenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antiviral activity, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Dendranthema hultenii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
